scripts.dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path .next) { try { Remove-Item .next -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Write-Host 'Skipping .next cleanup because it is in use.' } }"; next dev
scripts.report:fonts:build: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:NEXT_DIST_DIR='.next-font-report'; next build; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { node scripts/report-font-usage.mjs }"
